title: Lead
description: A lead in Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM, representing a potential customer who has not yet been qualified.

leadid.description: The unique identifier of the lead.

subject.description: The subject or topic of the lead.

firstname.description: The first name of the lead.

lastname.description: The last name of the lead.

fullname.description: The full name of the lead.

companyname.description: The company name of the lead.

jobtitle.description: The job title of the lead.

address1_line1.description: The first line of the address.

address1_stateorprovince.description: The state or province of the address.

address1_postalcode.description: The postal code of the address.

leadsourcecode.description: The source code indicating where the lead originated.

estimatedvalue.description: The estimated value of the lead.

statecode.description: The state of the lead (0 = Open, 1 = Qualified, 2 = Disqualified).

createdon.description: The date and time the lead was created.

modifiedon.description: The date and time the lead was last modified.
